overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a warrior character exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex at night. The character ascends multiple levels of stone staircases and colonnades, passing torch-lit corridors and draped pavilions, ultimately reaching a rooftop overlook with a panoramic view of Alexandria and the Lighthouse of Alexandria in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer temple colonnade with grand staircase

agents.ego_description: character ascends wide stone stairs and walks through columned peristyle of ancient temple

entered.detail: wide marble staircase with horizontal treads ascending toward temple entrance
tall cylindrical column with red banded base and capital
tall cylindrical column matching left side
wall-mounted iron bracket with burning flame providing warm illumination
mature tree with spreading canopy visible through colonnade

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a grand stone staircase within an ancient Egyptian temple complex. Tall columns with red-banded bases line both sides, while torch sconces cast flickering warm light against the cool blue night. The architecture features massive stone blocks and decorative lintels overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner temple courtyard with secondary staircase

events.description: character turns toward and begins ascending second set of stairs to upper temple level

agents.ego_description: character crosses inner courtyard and ascends secondary staircase toward upper colonnade

notable_agents.action: robed temple visitor descending the stairs in opposite direction

entered.detail: stone wall with hieroglyphic carvings and decorative friezes
large stone statue visible atop temple roofline against night sky

segments.scene_description: Moving through the inner courtyard, the character passes decorative stone walls with hieroglyphic carvings. A robed NPC descends the stairs ahead. The character then turns and ascends a second grand staircase, with stone statues visible silhouetted against the night sky atop the temple roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper colonnade with lit braziers and draped pavilions

events.description: ambient light shifts to warmer torch-dominant illumination as character moves deeper under roofed colonnade

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily through torch-lit colonnade passing other temple inhabitants

notable_agents.action: temple guard standing near column observing the area

entered.detail: large bronze bowl on stand containing burning fire providing primary illumination
white linen canopies draped between columns creating shaded pavilion area
stone archway marking transition to outer balcony area

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an upper colonnade where large lit braziers provide warm golden light against the blue night. White linen fabrics drape between columns ahead, creating a ceremonial pavilion atmosphere. A temple guard stands near a column to the left as the character approaches a stone archway leading to the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop overlook with panoramic view of ancient city and lighthouse

events.description: character emerges from colonnade onto open rooftop terrace revealing expansive city view
character slows pace while approaching balcony edge to observe the lighthouse and city below

agents.ego_description: character walks along rooftop overlook admiring the panoramic view of Alexandria and the illuminated lighthouse

entered.detail: low stone parapet wall marking the edge of the temple rooftop
panoramic view of ancient Alexandria with clustered buildings and streets below
tall white marble lighthouse (Pharos of Alexandria) with illuminated top visible in distance
palm tree canopies visible below the balcony level

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the open rooftop terrace, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of ancient Alexandria at night. The character walks along the stone balcony edge, passing large burning braziers, with the magnificent Lighthouse of Alexandria glowing in the distance. Below, the city sprawls with palm trees and rooftops visible in the moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent through a torch-lit Egyptian temple complex that gradually opens into a panoramic nighttime vista of Alexandria. It begins with the character climbing a grand stone staircase lined with red-banded columns, where flickering torchlight contrasts with the cool blue of the night. As the camera moves through an inner courtyard past hieroglyphic carvings, it ascends a second staircase toward silhouetted statues before shifting into an upper colonnade draped in white linen fabrics and illuminated by golden braziers. The scene then passes a temple guard and moves through a stone archway, finally emerging onto an open rooftop terrace. The perspective expands across a stone balcony to reveal the sprawling city below and the glowing Lighthouse of Alexandria standing prominently in the distance under the moonlight.
